title: Flaky Italian Whole Wheat Dough Pizza
description: Earthy and crunchy monsoon‑style Italian pizza made with whole wheat dough, score‑fat, and egg‑free, perfect for a warm, humid afternoon.
instructions: In a small bowl, dissolve 5g active dry yeast and 5g sugar in 120ml warm water; let it sit for 5 minutes until foamy.
In a large mixing bowl, combine 250g whole wheat flour and 5g salt; stir to mix.
Add the foamy yeast mixture and 15ml olive oil to the dry ingredients; mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough on a floured surface for about 8 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a lightly oiled bowl, cover with a damp cloth, and let it rise for 1 hour in a warm spot.
Preheat the oven to 220°C and place a pizza stone or baking sheet inside.
Punch down the risen dough, divide it into 4 equal portions, and roll each into a thin circle on a floured surface.
Spread 12.5g of tomato sauce over each dough circle, leaving a small border.
Sprinkle 12.5g shredded mozzarella over the sauce and top with a few chopped basil leaves.
Transfer the topped dough onto the preheated stone or sheet and bake for 12–15 minutes until the crust is golden and the cheese is bubbly.
